transcript: Speaker A: Hi teacher, nenu tea tagadaniki vachanu. Idi English ela cheppali? [Hi teacher, I came to drink tea. How to say this in English?] Speaker B: Nuvvu ila cheppachu: I came here to have tea. [You can say it like this: I came here to have tea.] Speaker A: Okay. Nenu tea bill adagali, daniki ela cheppali? [Okay. I have to ask for the tea bill, what should I say for that?] Speaker B: Nuvvu ila cheppachu: How much is the tea please? [You can say it like this: How much is the tea please?] Speaker C: Bro, nuvvu ekkada English nerchukuntunnav? [Bro, where are you learning English from?] Speaker A: SpeakX App lo, AI teacher tho. [In SpeakX App, with an AI teacher.] Speaker C: Naaku ardham kaaledu. [I didn't understand.] Speaker A: Idi oka app, ikkada AI teacher duara priti roju English practice cheyyachu nuvvu. Inka neeku telusu kada, English lekunda respect kuda raadhu, job kuda kastame. Anduke SpeakX app lo roju ki 10 to 15 minutes Practice chestunnanu. Ippatiki 10 days ayyayi, and that's why I can speak English so confidently without any fear. [This is an app, here you can practice English every day with an AI teacher. And you know, right? Without English, you don't get respect, and getting a job is also hard. That's why I practice for 10 to 15 minutes daily on the SpeakX app. It's been 10 days now, and that's why I can speak English so confidently without any fear.] Speaker C: Naaku kuda English nerchukovalani undi, kani courses chala Costly kada. [I also want to learn English, but courses are very costly, right?] Speaker A: Ee app chala cheapu. Rojki only 4 rupees, and also 7 days ki free trial kuda istharu veeru. [This app is very cheap. Only 4 rupees a day, and they also give a 7-day free trial.] Speaker C: Arey wah! okka nimisham, SpeakX app nenu kuda ippude download chesthanu. [Oh wow! Just a minute, I will also download the SpeakX app right now.]

summary: A man demonstrates how he practices English translation using the SpeakX app's AI teacher. His friend asks about his learning method, and he explains that the app offers daily practice for career success. Upon learning it costs only 4 rupees a day with a 7-day free trial, she decides to download it.
